HeroSection.subtitle: Turn STEM into a game - Inspire passion, creativity
HeroSection.title: The students' light bulbs are coming on
HeroSection.searchPlaceholder: What would you like to explore today?

ExploreResourcesSection.title: Explore resources
ExploreResourcesSection.description: We provide standards-aligned STEM courses for Grades 3–8, focusing on engineering, creativity, and hands-on learning. Students engage in building models with straws and open-ended challenges. Our program helps students learn through exploration while developing problem-solving and engineering skills.

ToolsSection.title: What is STEMify?
ToolsSection.description: STEMIFY Education’s solutions are ideal for classrooms, virtual learning environments, makerspaces, and other STEM programs. Our StemifyKits and easy-to-implement curriculum are designed to grow with students grades 3-12 and educators. Our solutions prepare all learners for success in STEM classrooms and careers.

BenefitSection.status: A World of STEAM at Your Fingertips!
BenefitSection.title: Stemify Resources
BenefitSection.benefit1Desc: Less prep work for you, more fun for everyone.
BenefitSection.benefit2Desc: No more struggling to integrate STEAM and STEM into your lesson planning.
BenefitSection.benefit3Desc: Make STEAM and STEM subjects accessible and increase long-term retention.

description.part1: Turn ideas into reality with our comprehensive STEM course.
description.part2: From the first components to the finished smart product,

FAQSection.title: Do you still have any questions?
FAQSection.description: Book a meeting to learn about our offline materials. We will contact you for customer care.

infoForParents.title: Information for Parents
infoForParents.description: STEMIFY Education is an online STEM learning platform for students in grades 3-8, offering courses and resources that help develop critical thinking, problem-solving, and creativity through hands-on learning.
